title: TDC: Therapeutics Data Commons
summary: Unified framework for therapeutic tasks including ADMET, drug-target interaction, and molecular generation.

title: TDC-2: Multimodal Foundation for Therapeutic Science
summary: Second generation TDC with multimodal data, expanded ADMET benchmarks, and improved evaluation protocols.

title: Matbench Discovery: An evaluation framework for ML crystal stability prediction
summary: ~250K crystal stability predictions. SOTA F1=0.924. Evaluation framework for materials discovery ML.

title: AlphaFold 3: Accurate structure prediction of biomolecular interactions
summary: Joint structure prediction of proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules, ions, and post-translational modifications.

title: RFdiffusion2: De novo enzyme active site design
summary: De novo enzyme active site design using diffusion models. Demonstrates AI-driven molecular design capabilities.

title: IsoDDE (AlphaFold4)
summary: PROVOCATIVE: Accuracy doubled over AlphaFold3 but closed-source, sparking open vs closed science debate.

title: Rentosertib Phase IIa: First AI-discovered drug clinical validation
summary: PROVOCATIVE: First AI-discovered drug (Insilico Medicine) passes clinical validation. Proof of AI drug discovery.

title: The AI Drug Revolution Needs a Revolution
summary: PROVOCATIVE: AI has not improved the ~90% clinical failure rate. Calls for fundamental rethinking of AI drug discovery.
